title: coryphopteris atjehensis
intro: Coryphopteris atjehensis, also known as the Atjeh fern or Atjeh cyathea, is a species of fern in the family Cyatheaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Coryphopteris atjehensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
